resources.string: We couldn’t load the ad right now. Please try again in a moment.
When you open your eyes that morning, what is the first thing you see?
What feels different in your body on that day?
Who is nearby, and how does that relationship feel now?
What tiny action today would make that future a little more real?
Your 5-day reward pass is active. AI coaching is available now.
Watch an ad in Settings to unlock AI coaching and reminder popups for 5 days.
These are the kinds of questions the AI guide should ask.
When you complete today action, the date fills in and your rhythm becomes visible.
Watch an ad in Settings to unlock dream coaching and reminder nudges for 5 days.
Reminder popups start together with the 5-day reward pass.
Coaching that keeps the dream moving
Start rehearsing your future rhythm in your body today.
Each small step today is bringing your dream into focus.

Already stores your journal entries and coaching progress on your device. If ads are enabled, Google AdMob may process device and consent information to serve rewarded ads. You can manage ad privacy choices from Settings at any time.

Already is a self-reflection and coaching companion. The app does not promise medical, legal, or financial outcomes. Rewarded features unlock temporary coaching support and reminders, and availability may change if ad services are unavailable.
Start with %1$s. One step today helps your future rhythm feel real.
Keep the thread of "%1$s" going with %2$s today.
The small things you have already done are building momentum. Record one more win and keep the dream moving.
You already made progress with "%1$s". Record one more small win today and keep the dream moving.
Reminds you to record one small step toward your dream.
Ready for one more small step?
Write as if that time has already arrived. Stay in the present tense.
Small actions are stacking up, and the future that felt vague is beginning to enter daily life.
It is okay to still be warming up. One small action today is enough to start a rhythm.
Your current rhythm is already connected to your future self. Keep following that feeling.
It does not need to be dramatic. Leave one action that moved you a little closer to the dream.
Example: I finally sent the email I had been delaying
It is okay if nothing is recorded yet. Leave one small win today and tomorrow’s encouragement will feel more personal.
You already built momentum with "%1$s". Carry that feeling into one more small step today.
Your reward pass is active. AI coaching and reminder nudges are ready.
Watch an ad in Settings to unlock 5 days of AI coaching and reminder nudges.
Your journals, reward status, and small-win history are stored on this device. You can clear them at any time.
This removes your stored journals, reward status, and small-win history from this device. This action cannot be undone.
Manage ad privacy choices, and review the privacy policy and terms inside the app.
Your 5-day reward pass is active until %1$s.
While active, AI coaching, the dream coaching board, and reminder popups stay available.
Watch an ad to unlock AI coaching, reminder popups, and small win logging for 5 days.
Watch ad to extend 5 more days
Manage language and the 5-day reward pass.
%1$d-year entry is still empty. Tap to start writing.
A quiet view across 1, 3, 5, and 10 years.
Your 5-day reward pass is active, so Home can continue the next step and daily small win flow.
I am living in a calmer, more intentional rhythm now.
